calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trustee, Trust Assets And Transfer Of Trust Assets Into Trust
Off Calendar Apr-01-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sean Patrick Miller, via zoom, for Kevin Woodard, Petitioner.

The court points counsel to its tentative ruling that the principal location of administration is not San Francisco as the 16061.7 notice indicates that trust administration takes place in Lafayette, CA, where the trustee lives. Counsel reports that the trustee does have a residence in Lafayette but that he spends a majority of his time at the real property located in San Francisco. Counsel offers additional testimony and cites Heggstad. The court offers its position regarding Heggstad as it relates to this matter and offers its tentative ruling that a pour over will cannot be treated as a trust instrument.

After additional discussion, the court advises counsel that it has considered counsel's arguments regarding venue and is taking the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.
